zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Ufford於1388年出生在英國諾福爾可霍斯福德時，她的父親Sir Robert de Ufford38歲，母親Eleanor Felton28歲。她去世於1409年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可明日香享年21歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可洛登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Ufford于1388年出生在英国諾福爾可霍斯福德时，她的父亲Sir Robert de Ufford38岁，母亲Eleanor Felton28岁。她去世于1409年在英国英格兰諾福爾可明日香享年21岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可洛登。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ufford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ufford (Northamptonshire), Ufford (Suffolk), or Offord Cluny or Offord Darcy (Huntingdonshire). The Northamptonshire and Suffolk placenames derive from the Old English personal name Uffa + Old English worth ‘enclosure’. For the Huntingdonshire placename see Offord , with which the surname may have been confused.

variants.name: Offord
meanings: English (East Anglia and London): habitational name from Offord Cluny and Offord Darcy in Huntindgonshire. The placename derives from Old English upp ‘up, upper’ + ford ‘ford’.
English: alternatively, from a lost place called Offord near Pennyford in Wootton Wawen, Warwickshire. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Offa + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Ufford was born in 1388, in Horsford, Norfolk, England, her father, Sir Robert de Ufford, was 38 and her mother, Eleanor Felton, was 28. She died in 1409, in Langley, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 21, and was buried in Loddon, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Ufford est née en 1388, à Horsford, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de Ufford, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Felton, avait 28 ans. Elle est décédée en 1409, à Langley, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 21 ans, et a été enterrée à Loddon, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Ufford 1388 in Horsford, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert de Ufford 38 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Felton 28. Sie starb 1409 im Alter von 21 Jahren in Langley, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Loddon, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Ufford è nata il nel 1388 nel Horsford, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Sir Robert de Ufford, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Felton, aveva 28 anni. Morì nel 1409, nel Langley, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 21 anni, e fu sepolta a Loddon, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Uffordが1388年にイギリスノーフォルクホールスフォードで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Uffordは38歳，母Eleanor Feltonは28歳であった。彼女は1409年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクラングリーで21歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクロッドオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Ufford(이)가 1388년 영국 노르폴크 호르스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert de Ufford(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Felton(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1409년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 랭글리에서 21세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 로던에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Ufford родилась в 1388 г. в местности хаурсфорд, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert de Ufford было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Felton, 28. Она умерла в 1409 г. в местности лангли, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 21 год и была похоронена в местности лоддон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
